forecast-period.text: Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Medium chance of showers in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then tending south to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers in the south in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 45 km/h before turning west to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Medium chance of showers in the morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Becoming cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h turning west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Sunny. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northerly 25 to 35 km/h in the middle of the day then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Medium chance of showers in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h shifting southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming south to southwesterly and light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Sunny. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northerly 25 to 35 km/h in the middle of the day then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

High chance of showers in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Medium chance of showers in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Medium chance of showers in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly in the morning then tending east to northeasterly in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then tending southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 32.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Ceduna. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northeasterly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 30 to 35.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:30am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds north to northeasterly 30 to 45 km/h tending north to northwesterly in the middle of the day then turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 28 to 33.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower east of Ceduna in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 25 km/h before tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day then becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the morning then turning west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Medium chance of showers in the morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny morning. High chance of showers in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Sunny day. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southwesterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Coober Pedy. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 28 to 35.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers west of Coober Pedy in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Coober Pedy in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h tending north to northwesterly in the middle of the day then shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Coober Pedy in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 32.

Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 35.
Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending northwest to northeasterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.

Mostly sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northeast to southeasterly during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 29 to 36.

Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 29 to 37.
